summary: Cycle F (6th overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-23, ~5h after cycle E — materially longer gap than the ~1h cadence of cycles A→E) ran heartbeat-only. Both queues absent on disk for 27th consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures sustained (24s elapsed at 09:02:28Z). Two substantive findings beyond pure heartbeat: (1) Cadence-shift observation — E→F gap ~5h vs A→E ~1h cadence; possibly throttled cron (which prior cycles' Founder-action item suggested) or natural variability or Ralph-loop infrastructure (landed 04:14Z) influence. Recorded as evidence, not as a new carry-over. (2) GATE-FAIL heartbeat post-mortem — the 06:56Z post-commit-hook heartbeat for HEAD ca542750 ('Maintenance run 2026-05-23' Founder commit) wrote status=GATE-FAIL with duration_seconds=0, ~25s after Maintenance run's own regen-all completed cleanly. Most likely interpretation: benign 'gate-skipped-because-recent-regen' rather than 'gate-failed-a-regen-attempt'. Cycle F's 09:02Z fresh regen-all returned status=PASS cleanly, superseding the 06:56Z GATE-FAIL. Added as new carry-over Founder-attention item #7 (clarify GATE-FAIL semantics). Cycle E's 'Notes for next cycle' prediction validated: Founder absorbed partygames.js WIP via commit 65198c0e (partygames empty state ship + d9628c63 bless). Isolation discipline served correctly. Founder commits in E→F window: 5 substantive (Ralph-loop infrastructure, app-health row updates, visual-audit chat+dms 32 surfaces, Maintenance run 2026-05-23, partygames empty state + bless) + 9 routine cron = 14 total over 5h. Substantive/hour cadence reduced D→E→F (9/57min → 1/h) consistent with marathon-mode tapering or sleep. Three pre-existing untracked Founder files at cycle F open (.claude/state/overnight-agent/reports/2026-05-23.md + tests/unit/animate.test.js + tests/unit/utils.test.js) left alone per isolation discipline. Single yellow user-context-gate continues (main-flows.html ~8.29d stale, was 8.08d at E — natural drift). Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST — empty-inbox honestly recorded; cadence-shift + GATE-FAIL observations are real findings, not invented to look productive. Seven carry-over Founder action items at cycle F close (6 preserved from E + 1 new GATE-FAIL semantics).
founder_action_items: Cron cadence - now 11th consecutive flag, but with one cycle of evidence cadence may have changed (E→F gap ~5h vs A→E ~1h). If this is throttling, Founder may have addressed via cron config (out of agent visibility). If natural variability, original Founder-action remains: edit overnight-triage cron prompt to add Step-0 guard that exits clean if `git log --since='3h'` shows no inbox motion AND last regen-all heartbeat is < 60 min old. Edge case worth Founder note: cycle F's read of the 06:56Z heartbeat (29 min before cycle F open) showed status=GATE-FAIL, not PASS — guard would NOT have exited cycle F. **Founder decision required (11th consecutive cycle flagging this).**

A8_performance: dimension score 80 green at cycle E (likely similar at cycle F regen), but underlying Lighthouse 65/100 on 1 page (target 75+) - open .lighthouseci/*.html, fix top failures (carry-over from cycles S→E; dimension score holds due to rolling-window mechanics but page-level fix still pending).

main-flows.html user-context capture ~8.29 days stale at cycle F (was 8.08 at cycle E — natural drift over ~5h gap) - run `node scripts/visual-audit/founder-context-capture.mjs` before next ship-close (not blocking; same diagnosis as cycles S→E).
quota-status weekly_cap field still null - no % computation possible (preserved Founder-triage item from cycles R→E; sidecar discipline OK per [quota-status-schema] check).

aggregate-fiq-status D40 parity GATE-FAIL - stale-timestamp >24h hard threshold tripped because FIQ has had zero churn across 27 consecutive empty-inbox cycles (~27h+ elapsed). NOT an aggregator bug (status=green declared=27 deployed=27 ran cleanly; idempotent-write correctly skipped unchanged content). Gate firing as designed. Remedies all cross Founder-decision boundary: (1) add last_polled_at heartbeat field to decouple poll-staleness from content-staleness, (2) raise 24h threshold to 48-72h, (3) refine D40 parity to distinguish idempotent-skip-grace from aggregator-failed-and-stale, (4) accept the GATE-FAIL as a faithful signal and surface it on dashboard. First flagged 2026-05-23 cycle B post-commit. Will trip on every cycle until FIQ activity resumes or remedy lands.

A12_operational - sustained yellow as of cycle E (60 yellow, oscillating between 60-100 across cycles B→E via rolling-window mechanics). Cycle F ran clean (no skip-dirty triggered by cycle F itself); current dimension score visible in cycle F's regenerated docs/reports/app-health.html if delta is material. Same remedy as cycle D: check .husky/post-commit doesn't dirty tree mid-run + verify routinePatterns allowlist covers all auto-generated outputs.

**NEW from cycle F:** Heartbeat `status: GATE-FAIL` field semantics — clarify whether GATE-FAIL means 'the gate prevented a regen run from happening' (cycle F's current interpretation, benign) or 'a regen run was attempted and failed at a gate' (alternate interpretation, would-be-substantive). The 06:56Z post-commit-hook heartbeat showed status=GATE-FAIL with duration_seconds=0 for HEAD ca542750, ~25s after Maintenance run's own regen-all completed cleanly — likely benign gate-skip, but the field naming makes monitoring ambiguous. Recommended: rename to GATE-SKIPPED if interpretation #1 is correct, OR distinguish GATE-SKIPPED vs GATE-FAIL semantics in the heartbeat schema. Out of cycle F scope to investigate `.husky/post-commit` + `scripts/regen-all.ps1` gate logic; logged as Founder-decision item.
